destinations.name: Delhi

destinations.name: Agra
destinations.description: Agra is home to the magnificent Taj Mahal, one of the Seven Wonders of the World. The city also houses the Agra Fort and Fatehpur Sikri.

destinations.name: Jaipur
destinations.description: Jaipur, the Pink City, is the capital of Rajasthan. Known for its stunning palaces, forts, and vibrant bazaars, Jaipur is a treasure trove of Rajput heritage.

destinations.name: Varanasi
destinations.description: Varanasi, one of the world's oldest cities, is India's spiritual capital. The ghats along the Ganges, evening Ganga Aarti, and ancient temples make it unforgettable.

destinations.seo_description: Visit Varanasi, the spiritual heart of India. Witness Ganga Aarti, ancient ghats and temples. Book Varanasi tour with Mother India Tour Travels.

destinations.name: Srinagar
destinations.description: Srinagar, the summer capital of Jammu & Kashmir, is famous for its Dal Lake, houseboats, and stunning Mughal Gardens.

destinations.name: Shimla
destinations.description: Shimla, the former summer capital of British India, is a charming hill station known for its colonial architecture, apple orchards, and scenic views.

destinations.name: Manali
destinations.description: Manali is a high-altitude Himalayan resort town known for skiing, trekking, adventure sports, and scenic views of snow-capped mountains.
destinations.best_time_to_visit: October to June (for snow), July to September (for trekking)
destinations.climate: Alpine – cold winters with heavy snowfall

destinations.name: Haridwar
destinations.description: Haridwar is one of the seven holiest places in Hinduism. The evening Ganga Aarti at Har Ki Pauri ghat is a spectacular spiritual experience.
